Name: ISO/IEC 27001:2013 - Vercel
Description: ISO/IEC 27001:2013 mapping for Vercel provider checks. Vercel holds ISO 27001:2013 certification; these mappings assess the customer-side of Vercel's shared responsibility model.

Requirements.Name: A.9.1 Business Requirements of Access Control
Requirements.Description: To limit access to information and information processing facilities.

Requirements.Name: A.9.2 User Access Management
Requirements.Description: To ensure authorized user access and to prevent unauthorized access to systems and services.

Requirements.Name: A.9.4 System and Application Access Control
Requirements.Description: To prevent unauthorized access to systems and applications.

Requirements.Name: A.10.1 Cryptographic Controls
Requirements.Description: To ensure proper and effective use of cryptography to protect the confidentiality, authenticity and/or integrity of information.

Requirements.Name: A.13.1 Network Security Management
Requirements.Description: To ensure the protection of information in networks and its supporting information processing facilities.

Requirements.Name: A.14.2 Security in Development and Support Processes
Requirements.Description: To ensure that information security is designed and implemented within the development lifecycle of information systems.

Attributes.Section: A.14 System Acquisition, Development and Maintenance
